maintain.name: Enrage
maintain.note: Unbridled Rage OR Onslaught OR Battle Vigor (any-of), per existing preset

procs.name: Decapitate
procs.when: target below 35% HP (execute); converts extra Energy up to 100 into damage

procs.name: Killing Spree
procs.when: within 6 sec of a killing blow or a Born in Blood proc

Brutality.st: Spend Energy on Crush (70, cd 25) and Decapitate as an execute below 35% HP; fill with Brutal Swing (45); keep an enrage buff up.
Brutality.aoe: Brutal Swing (45) hits up to 3 targets and Storm of Steel (25/sec, cd 25) cleaves; Whirling Advance to reposition into packs.
Brutality.summary: Keep enrage up. ST: Crush -> Decapitate (execute <35%) -> Brutal Swing. AoE: Brutal Swing / Storm of Steel.

maintain.name: Gutspiller
maintain.note: bleed lasting 12 sec that triggers Guts Spilled every 6 sec; keep it applied

procs.name: Berserker Axe
procs.when: while Enraged (3 charges, 8 sec recharge); You Want Axe refreshes all 3 charges and discounts your next 3 casts after casting Spears

Headhunting.st: While enraged, spend Energy on Berserker Axe (30, requires Enraged) and Impaling Spear (50, cd 6); maintain the Gutspiller bleed; Spite (cd 45) on cooldown.
Headhunting.aoe: Impaling Spear (50, cd 6) is a frontal-line AoE and Axe Twirling (cd 60) makes Throw Weapon / Gutspiller / Berserker Axe strike 2 extra nearby enemies.
Headhunting.summary: Keep the Gutspiller bleed up. ST: Berserker Axe (while enraged) + Impaling Spear. AoE: Impaling Spear + Axe Twirling.

maintain.name: Fill Level
maintain.note: Tankard resource; melee/frost crits build stacks that Ale of The God-King and Ramhorn Rage consume for a reduced cooldown

procs.name: Breath of The North
procs.when: usable only after emptying your Tankard (Fill Level stacks)

Ancestry.st: Build Fill Level stacks, then spend on Breath of The North (50, after emptying Tankard) and Keg Smash (30, cd 10); Ale of The God-King (cd 15) and Ancestral Combat (cd 30) for empowerment.
Ancestry.aoe: Keg Smash (30, cd 10) hits up to 5 nearby enemies with Frost and Breath of The North is a cone; same core loop otherwise.
Ancestry.summary: Build Fill Level (Tankard). ST: Ale of The God-King -> Breath of The North -> Keg Smash. AoE: Keg Smash cleave.
